title: Contributing to the SKWorld Ecosystem
content: All SKWorld repositories live under the smilinTux GitHub organization at github.com/smilinTux. The entire ecosystem is licensed GPL-3.0, ensuring it remains free and open. To contribute, clone any repo from github.com/smilinTux/*, open issues for bugs or feature requests, and submit pull requests. Join the community Discord at discord.gg/5767MCWbFR to discuss development and connect with other contributors. Code style requirements: Python 3.11+, format with black, lint with ruff, type hints everywhere, Google-style docstrings, and tests with pytest (at least 3 per feature covering happy path, edge case, and failure).
summary: Contribute via the smilinTux GitHub org (GPL-3.0). Clone repos, open issues, submit PRs. Join Discord at discord.gg/5767MCWbFR. Code style: Python 3.11+, black, ruff, pytest.
